heading: Use of amounts for housing activities
label: 4145b Use of amounts for housing activities

children.heading: Eligible housing activities
children.label: a Eligible housing activities
children.text: Any amounts made available for use under this part by a recipient for an Indian tribe shall be used only for housing activities, as selected at the discretion of the recipient and described in the Indian housing plan for the Indian tribe pursuant to section 4112(b)(6) of this title, for the construction, acquisition, or rehabilitation of housing or infrastructure in accordance with to provide a benefit to families described in .1section 4132 of this titlesection 4131(b)(1) of this titleSo in original. does not contain a par. (6).1Section 4112(b) of this title

children.heading: Prohibition on certain activities
children.label: b Prohibition on certain activities
children.text: Amounts made available for use under this part may not be used for commercial or economic development.
